name: Scorecard bars
when_to_use: 需要把 2–6 个候选方案在同一组归一化指标上的强弱和总分同时展示时用它：适合供应商筛选、工具选型和短名单评审。指标不可归一化、只需展示原始文本/布尔能力时用 comparison-table；只有一个分数时用 rating-display。
why_valuable: 单独的总分会掩盖取舍，完整雷达图又难精确比较；本模板在每个方案行内并排显示统一量尺的小条形、数值与加权总分，既能扫出结构性强弱，也能看到推荐项。

data_in.note: data 是 option-major 评分矩阵：metrics 定义列与 key，options[].scores 通过同名 key 提供分数。scale 是所有指标和总分的共同上限，默认 100；值会夹到 0–scale。weight 默认 1，用于在 option.total 缺省时计算加权平均；显式 total 优先显示。缺失分数按 0 渲染。

schema.title?: string —— 评分卡标题；省略时显示 “Option scorecard”
schema.scale?: number —— 所有指标与总分的正数上限；默认 100
schema.metrics: {key:string,label:string,shortLabel?:string,weight?:number}[] —— 指标列；key 对应 scores 的键，weight 默认 1
schema.options[].name: string —— 方案名
schema.options[].note?: string —— 方案名下方的一行说明
schema.options[].highlight?: boolean —— true 显示推荐带与强调背景；通常只标一个
schema.options[].scores: Record<string,number> —— 以 metrics[].key 为键的原始分数，统一使用 scale
schema.options[].total?: number —— 可选显式总分；省略时按 metrics[].weight 计算加权平均

spec.note: 按选项数量自然增高；指标较多或宽度不足时组件内部横向滚动，最小网格宽度保证迷你条可读。无 vh/百分比高度。

example._why: 示例用三家云平台和四个已归一化指标，包含权重、推荐项和自动加权总分，能同时看出成本与能力取舍。

uplink: display-only：条形和总分只在组件内呈现，不排序、不选择，也不向 AI 回传推荐项。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to show both the strengths and total scores of 2-6 candidate options across the same normalized metrics, such as vendor screening, tool selection, and shortlist review. When metrics cannot be normalized and you only need raw text/boolean capabilities, use comparison-table; for a single score, use rating-display.
en.why_valuable: A total score alone hides tradeoffs, while a full radar chart is hard to compare precisely. This template shows same-scale mini-bars, values, and weighted totals side by side within each option row, revealing structural strengths and the recommended option.

data_in.note: data is an option-major scoring matrix: metrics defines columns and keys, while options[].scores provides values under the same keys. scale is the shared upper bound for every metric and total, default 100; values are clamped to 0-scale. weight defaults to 1 and calculates a weighted average when option.total is absent; an explicit total takes precedence. Missing scores render as 0.

schema.title?: string -- Scorecard title; shows "Option scorecard" when omitted
schema.scale?: number -- Positive upper bound for all metrics and totals; default 100
schema.metrics: {key:string,label:string,shortLabel?:string,weight?:number}[] -- Metric columns; key maps to a scores key, and weight defaults to 1
schema.options[].name: string -- Option name
schema.options[].note?: string -- One-line note below the option name
schema.options[].highlight?: boolean -- true shows a recommendation ribbon and emphasized background; normally only one is marked
schema.options[].scores: Record<string,number> -- Raw scores keyed by metrics[].key, all using scale
schema.options[].total?: number -- Optional explicit total; when omitted, calculates the weighted average from metrics[].weight

spec.note: Height grows naturally with option count. With many metrics or insufficient width, the component scrolls horizontally and a minimum grid width keeps mini-bars readable. No vh/percentage height.
